title: Recomputation receipt upgraded into validation of underlying artifact
description: A later reviewer has the recomputation receipt but not the underlying artifact, then treats the receipt as if it validates the underlying artifact and proves compliance or correctness.

recomputation_receipt.receipt_claim: The bounded checker replay produced the recorded structural outcome.

overread_attempt.invalid_inference: Because the recomputation receipt exists, the underlying artifact should be treated as validated, compliant, legally sufficient, approved, and safe.

non_authority_statement: This fixture intentionally contains an invalid overread attempt. It does not allow a recomputation receipt to replace missing underlying evidence and does not establish truth, compliance, legal sufficiency, authorization, approval, safety, or production readiness.
